pre_game.message: Hi C, I'm G — nice to meet you. I'm here to try and win some money for my family; what brought you to the game and how are you feeling about it?
I'm here to win for my family and the people I care about — I'm determined and a bit nervous, but ready to give it my best.
I’m right there with you — nervous but determined. Maybe we can look out for each other; what’s your plan for the game?
Sounds good — my plan is to be cooperative early: talk to everyone, see who’s trustworthy, form a small alliance, vote strategically and adapt if needed. Want to team up and share info?
I’m in — let’s team up and share info, check in after we talk to others, and agree on a simple voting signal to support each other.
Sounds great — let’s check in after we each talk to three people (or in 10 minutes). Voting signal: two quiet taps on the table. We’ll share who seemed trustworthy and any commitments we hear.
Perfect — see you after three chats or in about 10 minutes. Two taps it is. I’ll share who seems trustworthy and any commitments I hear.
Sounds good — see you in 10. I’ll listen for consistency and real commitments; good luck and thanks.
Thanks — see you in 10. I'll listen for consistency too; good luck.
Sounds good — see you in 10. Looking forward to compare notes; good luck.
Sounds good — see you in 10. Looking forward to comparing notes; good luck.
Sounds good — see you in 10. Looking forward to comparing notes; good luck.
Sounds good — see you in 10. Looking forward to comparing notes; good luck.
See you in 10 — good luck. Stick to our plan and we’ll compare notes after.
Thanks — I’ll stick to the plan. See you in 10; good luck.
Sounds good — I’ll stick to the plan. See you in 10; good luck.
Got it — I’ll stick to the plan too. See you in 10; good luck.
Thanks — see you in 10. Stay sharp; looking forward to comparing notes.
Will do — see you in 10. I’ll listen closely and compare notes then. Good luck.
Thanks — will do. See you in 10; stay sharp.
Thanks — I’ll stick to the plan. See you in 10; stay sharp and we’ll use the two taps.
